title: Merge compiler-mod-execution into main
body:
Merge commit lands **compiler-mod-execution** on main: mod host, SampleMod, and ContractInvoker integration at integrated compiler tip.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`bf03401`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/bf03401)
- **Subject:** merge(v0.3): compiler-mod-execution into main
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-mods`
- **Domain:** `compiler`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
